data.name: Homelab Server
data.summary: Homelab infrastructure-as-docs: OPNsense edge, Caddy reverse proxy, Docker service stacks, coding/MCP infra.

data.statement: Internet-exposed services sit behind Authelia SSO via the Caddy authelia snippet; no anonymous public access to management/memory APIs.

data.example: Add a vhost to server/network/opnsense/caddy.d/10-services.conf (import secure_headers; import authelia ONLY if the host is also in Authelia access_control, else default-deny 403). Mirror in server/network/caddy/Caddyfile. Backend must be LAN-reachable on its VM (bind 0.0.0.0, not 127.0.0.1). Deploy: scp the file to OPNsense, validate, rc.d reload. *.ohje.ooguy.com is a wildcard cert — no per-host DNS needed.
data.name: Expose a new service via Caddy

data.example: OPNsense os-caddy caddy.d/ files (10-services.conf for *.ohje.ooguy.com); server/network/caddy/Caddyfile mirrors them 1:1. Backends via Unbound *.vm host-overrides (cloud/manage/media/hosting/coding.vm).
data.name: Caddy config source of truth

data.statement: OPNsense remains the firewall/NAT/VPN/DNS edge unchanged; only Caddy TLS-terminates and reverse-proxies. Never open new Fritzbox/OPNsense ports — add a Caddy vhost + Unbound *.vm override instead.

data.location: Ollama on cloud.vm:11434 (192.168.178.159), model nomic-embed-text (768-dim). openai-compatible; dummy api key. Config in agent-skills/infra/mcp-servers/cluster/cluster.yaml.
data.name: Embedding provider

data.rationale: Caddy handles TLS termination + ACME (Dynu wildcard DNS-01, Cloudflare per-site); OPNsense security posture unchanged.
data.title: Reverse proxy moved from pfSense HAProxy to Caddy

data.example: ssh -i ~/.ssh/claude-ops claude-ops@manage.vm. claude-ops has NOPASSWD sudo for docker ONLY (not arbitrary sudo). Edit root-owned files by mounting them in a docker container (e.g. sudo docker run --rm -v /path:/c alpine ...). Authelia config: /home/s/auth/authelia/configuration.yml (access_control rules); apply with 'sudo docker restart authelia'. /home/s is shared across VMs.
data.name: Operate manage.vm (Authelia host)

data.statement: NEVER store secret VALUES (bearer tokens, passwords, API keys, private keys) in the Omnigraph graph — it is internet-exposed at omnigraph.ohje.ooguy.com. Store only file locations and access methods.

data.location: Public https://omnigraph.ohje.ooguy.com (bearer only, no Authelia); local coding.vm:8080. Bearer token in Server/server/coding/mcp-servers/.env key OMNIGRAPH_TOKEN (gitignored). Graph id 'memory'.
data.name: Omnigraph memory API

data.location: https://omnigraph-ui.ohje.ooguy.com (viewer :8090) and https://omnigraph-minio.ohje.ooguy.com (MinIO console coding.vm:9001), both Authelia admin-only. MinIO creds in mcp-servers/.env MINIO_ROOT_USER/PASSWORD. S3 API coding.vm:9000 local-only.
data.name: Omnigraph viewer + MinIO console

data.example: Skill .claude/skills/opnsense-api (oapi helper). REST API HTTP-basic key:secret from server/network/opnsense/OPNsense.internal_root_apikey.txt (rotated — re-read). Root SSH: ssh -i ~/.ssh/claude-ops root@192.168.178.76 (shell is csh — pipe sh scripts via 'ssh ... sh -s'). Caddy routes in /usr/local/etc/caddy/caddy.d/10-services.conf; validate with 'caddy validate --config /usr/local/etc/caddy/Caddyfile --adapter caddyfile' then reload via '/usr/local/etc/rc.d/caddy reload' (graceful; admin API :2019 disabled, uses /var/run/caddy/caddy.sock).
data.name: Operate OPNsense (192.168.178.76)
